message:
🌱 Memoize AlertsContext value to prevent cascading re-renders (#10028)

Wrap all context callbacks (acknowledgeAlert, resolveAlert, createRule,
etc.) in useCallback with stable deps via refs. Create a stable proxy
for evaluateConditions through evaluateConditionsRef. Wrap the context
value object in useMemo so consumers only re-render when actual data
changes, not on every provider render.

Key changes:
- 9 callbacks wrapped in useCallback([]) using existing ref pattern
- resolveAlert: snapshot rule from rulesRef before queueMicrotask
- runAIDiagnosis: read alerts/rules from refs, startMission from ref
- stableEvaluateConditions: ref-based proxy avoids unstable eval deps
- value wrapped in useMemo with all deps listed

Impact: 8 context consumers no longer re-render on unrelated state
changes in the provider.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
